functional.description: Identify all missing skill and checklist files through agent validation logs.
functional.rationale: To know exactly which assets are missing for compliance.
acceptance: npm run validate:agents shows identified missing files.

functional.description: Restore identified missing core skill and agent checklist assets from the official repository.
functional.rationale: To restore framework functionality and eliminate warnings.

functional.description: Verify asset restoration with framework validation tools.
functional.rationale: To ensure 100% compliance for these specific assets.
acceptance: npm run validate:agents reports zero warnings for restored assets.

constraints.impact: Prevents data loss of existing project-specific configurations.
Ensures version compatibility with AIOX-CORE v5.0.3.
